channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Brandi Carlile @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-07 03:00 — Brandi Carlile at Chase Center. Brandi Carlile's powerful storytelling and strong live reputation make this a must-see event.

item.title: ARMNHMR @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-03-01 03:30 — ARMNHMR at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. ARMNHMR is gaining buzz in the electronic scene, promising an energetic live show.

item.title: BENEE @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-01 04:00 — BENEE at The Fillmore. BENEE's unique sound and engaging performances have made her a rising star in pop music.

item.title: Indigo De Souza @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-07 04:00 — Indigo De Souza at The Fillmore. Gogol Bordello is known for their electrifying live performances and eclectic sound.

item.title: Aimee Mann @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-11 03:00 — Aimee Mann at The Fillmore. Aimee Mann's anniversary tour offers a nostalgic look back at her influential work.

item.title: Van Morrison @ Palace of Fine Arts
item.description: 2026-02-24 03:00 — Van Morrison at Palace of Fine Arts. Van Morrison's legacy as a classic artist makes this show a significant event.

item.title: Nine Inch Nails @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-16 03:00 — Nine Inch Nails at Chase Center. Nine Inch Nails' return promises a powerful and immersive live experience.

item.title: The Strumbellas @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-08 04:00 — The Strumbellas at August Hall. The Strumbellas are known for their anthemic sound and engaging live shows.

item.title: Bad Omens @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-03-28 02:00 — Bad Omens at Oakland Arena. Bad Omens' rising popularity in the rock scene makes their tour an exciting prospect.

item.title: Excision @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-03-14 02:00 → 2026-03-15 02:00 — Excision at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Jonah Kagen's rising star status and engaging performances make this show noteworthy.

item.title: Dave @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-01 03:00 — Dave at Fox Theater - Oakland. Dave's unique blend of hip-hop and storytelling is sure to resonate with fans.

item.title: Joseph @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-01 04:30 — Joseph at August Hall. Joseph's harmonies and folk-pop sound create a captivating live experience.

item.title: Silversun Pickups @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-03-08 03:30 — Silversun Pickups at Uptown Theatre Napa. Silversun Pickups' unique sound and energetic performances are always a treat.

item.title: ZZ Ward @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-02-26 04:00 — ZZ Ward at Uptown Theatre Napa. ZZ Ward's blend of blues and pop makes her a compelling live performer.

item.title: Chris Isaak @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-02-27 04:00 — Chris Isaak at Uptown Theatre Napa. Chris Isaak's classic hits and charismatic stage presence make for a nostalgic experience.

item.title: Zara Larsson @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-03-04 04:00 — Zara Larsson at Fox Theater - Oakland.
